sources.title: The Horrible Dr. Hichcock 1962
sources.description: In 19th century London, a woman marries a renowned doctor then discovers his bizarre necrophiliac tendencies and that his first wife died under very mysterious circumstances

metadata.Plot: The year is 1885, and necrophiliac Dr. Hitchcock likes to drug his wife for sexual funeral games. One day he accidentally administers an overdose and kills her. He leaves his home shattered. Several years later he remarries and returns with his wife. His wife starts to feel and hear strange things in the house.
metadata.Actors: Barbara Steele, Robert Flemyng, Silvano Tranquilli
